name: Wall Tile Calculator
seo_title: Wall Tile Calculator – Bathroom & Shower Tiling (2026)
seo_description: Free wall tile calculator for bathrooms, showers & kitchens. Calculate exactly how many tiles you need including adhesive & grout. Instant results with waste factor.
result_context: For {area} m² of wall: {piezas_ud} tiles needed, {cajas_ud} boxes, {adhesive_kg} kg adhesive.
formula_display: Tiles = Area / (tile_m x tile_m); Boxes = Tiles / pieces per box
steps: Apply 10% waste (more cuts on walls): 875 x 1.10 = 963 tiles
mistakes: Not starting from center or visible point (asymmetric cuts)
Not using leveling system for large format tiles
Not waterproofing shower walls before tiling
desc: Wall Tile Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
